corrections.name: QCD_fake_factors
corrections.description: Calculation of the QCD part the for data-driven background estimation (fake factors) for misindentified jets as tau leptons in H->tautau analysis.

inputs.name: pt_2
inputs.description: transverse momentum of the subleading hadronic tau in the tau pair; measured between (njets>=2): (30.0, 150.0) GeV; for higher/lower pt's the edge values are used

inputs.name: njets
inputs.description: number of jets in an event; the defined categories are  >=2

inputs.name: syst
inputs.description: Uncertainties from the best fit for the fake factor measurement.

output.name: QCD_ff
output.description: QCD part of the fake factor

corrections.name: Wjets_fake_factors
corrections.description: Calculation of the Wjets part the for data-driven background estimation (fake factors) for misindentified jets as tau leptons in H->tautau analysis.

inputs.name: pt_2
inputs.description: transverse momentum of the subleading hadronic tau in the tau pair; measured between (njets>=2): (30.0, 150.0) GeV; for higher/lower pt's the edge values are used

inputs.name: njets
inputs.description: number of jets in an event; the defined categories are  >=2

inputs.name: syst
inputs.description: Uncertainties from the best fit for the fake factor measurement.

output.name: Wjets_ff
output.description: Wjets part of the fake factor

corrections.name: ttbar_fake_factors
corrections.description: Calculation of the ttbar part the for data-driven background estimation (fake factors) for misindentified jets as tau leptons in H->tautau analysis.

inputs.name: pt_2
inputs.description: transverse momentum of the subleading hadronic tau in the tau pair; measured between (njets==2): (30.0, 150.0) GeV; (njets>=3): (30.0, 150.0) GeV; for higher/lower pt's the edge values are used

inputs.name: njets
inputs.description: number of jets in an event; the defined categories are  ==2, >=3

inputs.name: syst
inputs.description: Uncertainties from the best fit for the fake factor measurement.

output.name: ttbar_ff
output.description: ttbar part of the fake factor

corrections.name: process_fractions
corrections.description: Calculation of process contributions (process_fractions) for the fake factor calculation.

inputs.name: mt_1
inputs.description: transverse mass of the lepton and MET in the tau pair; measured between (njets<=1): (0.0, 70.0) GeV; (njets>=2): (0.0, 70.0) GeV; for higher/lower mt's the edge values are used

inputs.name: njets
inputs.description: number of jets in an event; the defined categories are  <=1, >=2

inputs.name: syst
inputs.description: Uncertainties from the +/-7% variation of the process fractions.
